title: Excel to PDF — Convert Spreadsheets Offline
h1: Convert Excel Spreadsheets to PDF Securely
description: Turn .xlsx and .csv files into crisp PDFs locally in your browser. Financial data stays on your device. Perfect for users in Istanbul.

sections.title: Why Convert Excel Offline?
sections.content: Spreadsheets often contain sensitive financial data. Our browser-based engine converts without any server involvement.

sections.title: How to Export Excel as PDF

steps.title: Choose Sheet Range
steps.description: Pick which sheets or rows to include.

steps.title: Export as PDF
steps.description: Download your spreadsheet as a clean PDF.

sections.title: Excel to PDF for Istanbul Businesses
sections.content: Businesses in Istanbul use our tool to share financial reports without exposing raw spreadsheet data.

sections.title: Protect Financial Spreadsheets
sections.content: Balance sheets, payroll data — all processed offline. Zero data sent to any third party.

sections.title: Spreadsheet-to-PDF in Seconds
sections.content: No upload queue, no compression artifacts. Your spreadsheet renders natively in-browser.

faqs.a: Yes, formula results are captured in the PDF snapshot.
Yes, you can include all sheets or specific ones.

faqs.q: Is this secure for financial data?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The file never leaves your browser.
